# {{ site.title }}

> {{ site.description | capitalize }} by {{ site.author }}. Notes on Ruby, Rails, and adjacent corners of software engineering.

This is a personal programming blog. Articles are short, focused, and code-heavy. Full content of each post is available at its URL.
